meta.name: Village Knowledge Expansion
meta.description: Curriculum design, lesson architecture, assessment creation, and teaching material development following ADDIE model and backward design.

tasks.title: Write 5 Measurable Learning Outcomes for One Module
tasks.subject: Learning Outcomes
tasks.successCriteria: 5 outcomes using measurable verbs (Bloom's Taxonomy) that match module scope

steps.action: Write the module's overall goal in 1-2 sentences (3 min)
Identify the learner transformation: what can they DO after this module? (5 min)
Review Bloom's Taxonomy verb lists for each cognitive level (2 min)
Draft 5 outcome statements using different verbs (remember, understand, apply, analyze, evaluate, create) (15 min)
Remove vague words: 'know', 'understand', 'learn' → replace with measurable actions (5 min)
Check that each outcome matches a specific lesson or activity in your module (5 min)
Save outcomes and add to your course design document (3 min)
Share outcomes with a peer for clarity check (2 min)

tasks.notes: Start with outcomes before designing content. Every activity and assessment should map to an outcome.

tasks.title: Design Complete Lesson Flow with Timing
tasks.subject: Lesson Architecture
